commentary:
**REGIME FLIP INTO BREAKOUT MODE** - Dealers just flipped short gamma with GEX zeroing out, meaning they're now forced to chase momentum in both directions. With no meaningful gamma walls showing and spot at 6582, expect amplified moves as dealers buy any rips and sell any dips, creating a feedback loop that extends trends rather than containing them.

Watch for acceleration through any meaningful option strikes as dealers will have minimal cushion to absorb volatility - this setup typically produces explosive moves once directional momentum establishes, particularly dangerous for any counter-trend positions.
